title: Build High-Signal Lead Gen Agent
description: An agent that monitors hiring signals, funding data, LinkedIn activity and G2 reviews to find companies actively evaluating conversational AI for Zoom/Teams. Scores leads by how many signals fire simultaneously.

title: Automated LinkedIn Outreach Sequences
description: Once browser automation is live, automatically send personalised connection requests and follow-up messages to prospects with context from their recent activity (job postings, LinkedIn posts, funding news).

title: Daily Gmail Triage Agent
description: Each morning scan Gmail for emails needing action, categorise them (reply needed, FYI, lead, opportunity) and send a prioritised summary. Auto-draft replies for routine emails.

title: Nth Layer Pipeline Tracker
description: Connect Pipedrive to a daily agent that reviews deal stages, flags stalled opportunities and suggests next actions. Sends a daily pipeline briefing with specific recommended actions per deal.

title: Community Engagement Tracker
description: Track which Reddit/HN/LinkedIn discussions you've engaged with, monitor for replies/follow-ups and surface threads gaining traction. Measures engagement rate vs new leads generated.
